stimulus: In 1908, naturalist Gifford Pinchot accompanied President Theodore Roosevelt on a five-day boat tour down the Mississippi River. Upon completing the journey, Roosevelt ______blank to expand the country’s system of national forests, a promise he honored before leaving office the following year.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The past tense verb “pledged” is consistent with the other past tense verbs in the passage (“accompanied,” “honored”) and the past time frame (1908).

Choice A (present progressive), Choice B (simple present), and Choice D (future) all use tenses inconsistent with the past time frame.
